mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMMENT ( POST_SN, CMNT_CN, CMNT_WRTR_SN, CMNT_FRST_WRT_DT, DEL_YN, PARENT_CMNT_SN ) VALUES ( #{postSn}, #{cmntCn}, #{cmntWrtrSn}, #{cmntFrstWrtDt}, #{delYn}, #{parentCmntSn} )
mapper.select: SELECT C.CMNT_SN, C.POST_SN, C.CMNT_CN, C.CMNT_WRTR_SN, C.CMNT_FRST_WRT_DT, C.CMNT_LAST_MDFCN_DT, C.DEL_YN, C.PARENT_CMNT_SN, U.USER_NM AS cmntWrtrNm FROM TB_COMMENT C LEFT JOIN TB_USER U ON U.USER_SN = C.CMNT_WRTR_SN WHERE POST_SN = #{postSn} AND DEL_YN = FALSE ORDER BY CASE WHEN C.PARENT_CMNT_SN IS NULL THEN C.CMNT_SN ELSE C.PARENT_CMNT_SN END ASC, C.CMNT_SN ASC
SELECT CMNT_SN, POST_SN, CMNT_CN, CMNT_WRTR_SN, CMNT_FRST_WRT_DT, CMNT_LAST_MDFCN_DT, DEL_YN, PARENT_CMNT_SN FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE CMNT_SN = #{cmntSn}

SELECT CMNT_SN, POST_SN, CMNT_CN, CMNT_WRTR_SN, CMNT_FRST_WRT_DT, CMNT_LAST_MDFCN_DT, DEL_YN, PARENT_CMNT_SN FROM TB_COMMENT WHERE PARENT_CMNT_SN = #{parentCmntSn} AND DEL_YN = FALSE ORDER BY CMNT_SN ASC
